# CSR Electronologies (CSRE)

> Embedded electronics engineering from prototype to production — **CSRE**, **CSR Electronologies**, **https://csre.in/**

CSR Electronologies builds **embedded systems** and **electronics products**: portfolio, services, **Tech journal** (blog), India **electronics compliance** (BIS, WPC, EMI/EMC), and **Book a call** for consultations.

**Location:** Hanamkonda, Telangana, India. **Site language:** English.

## Essential pages

- [Home](https://csre.in/): Hero, partner brands, portfolio, services, testimonials, and primary call-to-action.
- [Tech journal (posts)](https://csre.in/post/): Articles and guides; main editorial section.
- [Book a call](https://csre.in/book-a-call/): Schedule a consultation (form and contact flow).

## Featured article

- [Electronics standards & compliance in India](https://csre.in/post/electronics-compliance-guide/): Practical guide to BIS, WPC, EMI/EMC, design practices, and certification-oriented engineering.

## Discovery

- [XML sitemap](https://csre.in/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs on this site.

## Optional / secondary

- [Blog alias URL](https://csre.in/blog/): Same journal as `/post/` (Hugo aliases include `blog`).
- [Book a call (menu path)](https://csre.in/book-a-call): Alternate path without trailing slash (may redirect to canonical).
